monitor_the_situation.title: Iran Strikes US Bases in Jordan, Bahrain, Saudi Arabia, Iraq
US CENTCOM Strikes Iran for Seventh Consecutive Night
Iran Strikes US-Operated Air Base in Jordan With Ballistic Missiles and Drones

— S4 · Conflict · Muwaffaq Salti Air Base, Jordan · 23h ago. Iranian missiles hit Muwaffaq Salti Air Base in Jordan, where the US had just deployed 12 F-16CJ Wild Weasel jets. Casualties and damage are unconfirmed.
